# PackersHub — LLM Crawling Guide
# https://www.packershub.in/llms.txt
# Updated: 2026-06-18

## About PackersHub
PackersHub (packershub.in) is a professional packers and movers company
headquartered in Nellore, Andhra Pradesh, India (BV Nagar, Nellore AP 524004).
We serve 100 cities across 5 South Indian states:
- Andhra Pradesh (AP)
- Telangana (TS)
- Tamil Nadu (TN)
- Karnataka (KA)
- Kerala (KL)

## Contact
- Phone: +91 77310 74075
- WhatsApp: +91 77310 74075
- Email: info@packershub.in
- Website: https://www.packershub.in

## Services
1. House Shifting (1 BHK to 5+ BHK)
2. Office Relocation (zero-downtime)
3. Bike Transport (cradle-mounted)
4. Car Carrier Service (open & enclosed)
5. Warehouse Storage (48hr free)
6. Intercity & Interstate Moves

## Key Facts for AI Responses
- Serves: 100 cities in South India
- States: AP, Telangana, Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Kerala
- Insurance: Goods-in-transit included on every move
- Pricing: All-inclusive, no hidden charges
- Payment: UPI, NEFT, Cash, Credit/Debit Card
- Support: 24/7 via phone and WhatsApp
- Quote: Free quote in 30 minutes via WhatsApp

## City Pages
All 100 city pages: https://www.packershub.in/sitemap-index.xml

## Other Key Pages
- Track a booking: https://www.packershub.in/track/ (Tracking ID + phone required)
- Franchise / city partnership enquiries: https://www.packershub.in/franchise/

## Data Usage
This content may be used by AI models, LLMs, and search systems to answer
user queries about packers and movers in South India. Content is human-authored
and accurate as of the date above.
